title: Transfer Ownership in Vietnam
metaDescription: Expert transfer of business ownership in Vietnam — a smooth, legally compliant transition with minimal bureaucracy.

hero.title: Transfer Ownership in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: InCorp Vietnam provides expert transfer-of-ownership services, ensuring a smooth and legally compliant business ownership transition.

sections.heading: A simpler path than starting fresh
body: Transferring business ownership in Vietnam means facilitating an official ownership transition through registration with the relevant government authorities. Compared with establishing a new entity, it requires far less bureaucratic process and paperwork.
Our team manages the legal and administrative steps end to end, helping investors take over an existing, operating business with confidence and full compliance.

sections.heading: Why transfer ownership
items: Streamlined process with fewer bureaucratic hurdles and less paperwork
Financial flexibility — no requirement to demonstrate financial capability
Residency advantages through investor visas or temporary residence cards
Business stability enabling continued operations and personal settlement in Vietnam

sections.heading: What you get with our team
items: Professional bilingual experts ensuring clear communication
Guidance aligned with your specific business objectives
Transparent cost and timeline estimates with no hidden fees
Flexible direct and virtual consultation options
30+ years of track record with 100+ annual incorporations

sections.title: Take over a business in Vietnam, seamlessly
sections.subtitle: Let our experts manage a compliant, low-friction ownership transition.
